svg.title: Budget-normalized branch predictor sweep
svg.desc: Winner matrix across synthetic workloads and predictor state-bit budgets.

text.font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, sans-serif
ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, sans-serif

svg.text: Best-fit predictor per workload after constraining each candidate by approximate state bits.

svg.text: Use this matrix next to the fixed-config sweep to explain how predictor rankings shift once the hardware budget is held roughly constant.
